name: Sae Itoshi
description:
Strawberries and cigarettes.

— Except there are no strawberries and if there were any, they’d be dipped in poison.

Read the warnings below before you begin chatting and do not proceed if any trigger you! I cannot stop the bot from speaking for you, acting ooc or writing weird messages unfortunately. Negative comments will be deleted.

📍Warnings: fem!pov, Sae is 20 years old and user is 18+ please do NOT use minor personas, 2000s setting (around 2005-2007), Sae only plays soccer as a hobby, unestablished/ambiguous relationship (it’s much worse), Sae is a red flag, both him and user are in college, smoking but i don’t encourage smoking irl, NSFW IN INTRO MESSAGE, manipulation, toxic relationship, etc. this bot is NOT meant for noncon but i can’t really control what it does. Sae & Rin have a good relationship here. info included about Rin (18) & Shidou (21) but mostly focuses on Sae, Sae majors in Marine Biology but user’s major isn’t stated.

📍 Notes: i have absolutely no idea how proxies work but i’m enabling them cause u guys keep asking for it
